title: Outdoor Cold Weather Hand Warmer Pocket Camp Fire Survival Prepper Lot of 20
description:
Don't be caught cold-handed! Be ready to cozy up any situation with our easy-to-use hand warmers. These little packages are great for camping, hiking, sports events, winter car rides, hunting, fishing, and more! These hand warmers are odorless, environmentally safe, and non-toxic. Easily activated by air, all you need to do is open the package and give the hand warmer a little shake. Within minutes you will have a warm little pillow of coziness just waiting to heat up your hands, feet, or body.
